title: wyred contract v0 — bill of materials (.bom.json)
description: Descriptive schema for the grouped BOM data path, extracted from its producer wyred/paths.py `build_bom` — there is NO prose for this kind (F1). Seven top-level keys, all always emitted: artifact/authored_total/component_total/generated_total/line_items/path/stamp. `path` is const "bom". Each line_item groups components by (kind, value, authored). F10: the `derived` map (a per-refdes derivation confession) is present in the goldens IFF authored is false — a biconditional STRICTER than the producer (`build_bom` only adds `derived` when non-empty, so it merely guarantees the forward implication derived⇒¬authored); the schema encodes the golden-observed iff via a two-branch oneOf. additionalProperties:false throughout.

line_item.description: One grouped BOM line: components sharing (kind, value, authored), with the group's refdes list. F10 biconditional: an authored:true line carries NO `derived` key; an authored:false line ALWAYS carries a non-empty `derived` map (<refdes> -> derivation-reason string). The two oneOf branches make exactly one match: the authored=true branch omits `derived` (and additionalProperties:false forbids it); the authored=false branch requires it.

derived.description: per-refdes derivation confession; <refdes> -> human reason string (e.g. "decoupling for mcu.pwr"). Non-empty by construction (only added when the group has derived-value components).
